entry.title: New IDC W31P4Q20D0023 awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS-OTS, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO PROCURE HYDRA 70 ROCKETS, MOTORS AND ENGINEERING SERVICES

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: ROCKETS, ROCKET AMMUNITION AND ROCKET COMPONENTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
